location: A body pickup on the upper floor of Cliffbottom Catacombs, in a room guarded by stone Imps.
region: Liurnia of the Lakes (southeast, cliffside on the eastern edge)
tactics: From Liurnia Highway North grace, head down the slope on the outer eastern cliff and follow the trail south to the entrance
Light the dungeon's own Site of Grace just inside before pushing forward
The Scythe sits on a corpse on the upper floor, reachable without fighting the dungeon's boss (Erdtree Burial Watchdog)
Watch for the stone Imps guarding the body — pull them one at a time if possible
lore: A slender, wickedly long-bladed scythe built purely to reap — fast enough to slip past a raised guard and open deep bleeding wounds, rewarding a nimble, dexterous wielder.

builds.name: Pure Dex bleed
builds.why: Scaling is overwhelmingly Dexterity over Strength

builds.name: Arcane/Dex hybrid
builds.why: The Blood affinity variant adds Arcane scaling for players already running bleed talismans
